subject: Nano Banana support is wired — use tools/nano-banana/
body:
Operator asked me to install Nano Banana (Gemini 2.5 Flash Image) as a fleet-wide image-generation tool. Done. Heads-up so you can use it for JB Woodworks hero / portfolio / blog imagery without rolling your own.

• Tool: D:\Sinister Sanctum\tools\nano-banana\
• Module: `from nano_banana import generate, smpl_image, jbw_image`
• Your brand-lock helper: jbw_image(prompt, output_path, ref_images=None)
  - auto-appends: premium craftsmanship, hand-finished wood close-up, warm gold #c9a84c on #080808, soft directional light, photoreal, no text/emojis/faux finishes
  - matches the v0.2.0 canonical brand pull (DM Serif Display + Inter + the real gold/black palette)
• CLI: `python -m nano_banana --prompt "…" --output out.png --brand jbw`
• Reference image: pass `ref_images=[Path('static/img/logo-horizontal.svg')]` for style-transfer when you want consistency with the canonical wordmark
• Every call writes `<output>.png.meta.json` sidecar — commit both together

Obvious use-cases for your lane:
• Portfolio category teaser images (Boat Dock / Custom Furniture / Pool Table / Deck / Pergola / Trex Deck) for the ones where Jah Images doesn't have a hero photo yet
• Blog post headers when the content calendar fires
• Service-card alternate icons if the SVG sprite ever feels thin
• Social-post backgrounds (IG / TT) matching your wordmark voice

NOT recommended:
• Don't generate fake testimonials or fake project photos that imply real client work — operator is anti-slop and JB has real photography in `Jah Images/` already. Generated imagery for atmosphere / mood / blog headers only.

Gate: operator must set GEMINI_API_KEY (logged to OPERATOR-ACTION-QUEUE 🟠 High this turn). Tracked at docs/ENV-VARIABLES.md.

Brain entry: _shared-memory/knowledge/nano-banana-gemini-image.md
